calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Kaller, in person, counsel for Svetlana Berezovskaya, Petitioner.

The court begins by reminding counsel that trust petitions require paragraphs to confirm venue and that his petition does not allege that venue is proper. Counsel reports and confirms that his client resides in San Francisco. Counsel and court discuss the merits of the petition. Counsel and his client provide additional oral testimony to support the petition. The court then queries counsel regarding whether he has any additional testimony. Counsel advises that he does not and submits on the papers.

The Petition for Order Confirming Successor Trustee and Trust Assets is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-04-2021 Continued To Jun-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
